channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Wall Street Journal and CNN say Israel has told them of an a…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Wall Street Journal and CNN say Israel has told them of an assassination plot against the president.
item.content:encoded: Wall Street Journal and CNN say Israel has told them of an assassination plot against the president.

item.title: Privacy advocates, CAA, and SAG-AFTRA slam Meta's Muse Image…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Privacy advocates, CAA, and SAG-AFTRA slam Meta's Muse Image, which lets users create AI images using the likenesses of people with public Instagram accounts (Ina Fried/Axios)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Privacy advocates, CAA, and SAG-AFTRA slam Meta's Muse Image, which lets users create AI images using the likenesses of people with public Instagram accounts (Ina Fried/Axios)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: A passenger on a Ryanair flight was sucked halfway out of th…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: A passenger on a Ryanair flight was sucked halfway out of the plane after the window he was sitting next to became dislodged in midair. https://cnn.it/3STp1RO
item.content:encoded: A passenger on a Ryanair flight was sucked halfway out of the plane after the window he was sitting next to became dislodged in midair. https://cnn.it/3STp1RO

item.title: A bipartisan group of senators said they have an agreement w…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: A bipartisan group of senators said they have an agreement with the Trump administration to move ahead with new Russian sanctions legislation
item.content:encoded: A bipartisan group of senators said they have an agreement with the Trump administration to move ahead with new Russian sanctions legislation

item.title: “The Real Housewives of Orange County” star Jennifer Pedrant…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: “The Real Housewives of Orange County” star Jennifer Pedranti says her son and “others were involved” in the Ladera Ranch brush fire in California. The mother of five — four sons and one daughter — did not mention which son was involved in the incident.
item.content:encoded: “The Real Housewives of Orange County” star Jennifer Pedranti says her son and “others were involved” in the Ladera Ranch brush fire in California. The mother of five — four sons and one daughter — did not mention which son was involved in the incident.

item.title: When Norway faces England in the World Cup quarterfinals on …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: When Norway faces England in the World Cup quarterfinals on Saturday, the Norwegians will be modest underdogs despite their strong showing so far. But in 1981, the gap between the nations was astronomical.
item.content:encoded: When Norway faces England in the World Cup quarterfinals on Saturday, the Norwegians will be modest underdogs despite their strong showing so far. But in 1981, the gap between the nations was astronomical.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第12話]モシュネプロジェクト - 冴豆祐人 | 少年ジャンプ＋ モシュネプロジェクト 冴豆祐…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第12話]モシュネプロジェクト - 冴豆祐人 | 少年ジャンプ＋

モシュネプロジェクト 冴豆祐人 <隔週土曜更新>ジャンプ＋連載オーディション2023大賞受賞作！工場で働く吉良宮雅の前に突然現れた宇宙人・モシュネ。コピー能力を持つモシュネの力が地球を揺るがす大事件に発展する!?ネオ宇宙人ストーリー開幕！ [JC上・下巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第12話]モシュネプロジェクト - 冴豆祐人 | 少年ジャンプ＋

モシュネプロジェクト 冴豆祐人 <隔週土曜更新>ジャンプ＋連載オーディション2023大賞受賞作！工場で働く吉良宮雅の前に突然現れた宇宙人・モシュネ。コピー能力を持つモシュネの力が地球を揺るがす大事件に発展する!?ネオ宇宙人ストーリー開幕！ [JC上・下巻9/4発売予定]

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com Recent restrictions on the A.I.…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Recent restrictions on the A.I. industry “are the latest instance of the White House creating its own parallel administrative state, sidestepping Congress,” David Lawrence writes. “Congress and the courts must push back.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Recent restrictions on the A.I. industry “are the latest instance of the White House creating its own parallel administrative state, sidestepping Congress,” David Lawrence writes. “Congress and the courts must push back.”

item.title: 【沖縄本島も荒天】 大型で強い台風9号(バービー)が沖縄の先島諸島に接近中です。 台風の中心から300km以上離れた沖縄…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【沖縄本島も荒天】
大型で強い台風9号(バービー)が沖縄の先島諸島に接近中です。
台風の中心から300km以上離れた沖縄本島も暴風域に入っていて、強雨や35m/sを超える暴風に見舞われています。暴風域は半径360kmと広大で、これは東京〜広島が入るほどの大きさです。停電注意
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【沖縄本島も荒天】
大型で強い台風9号(バービー)が沖縄の先島諸島に接近中です。
台風の中心から300km以上離れた沖縄本島も暴風域に入っていて、強雨や35m/sを超える暴風に見舞われています。暴風域は半径360kmと広大で、これは東京〜広島が入るほどの大きさです。停電注意
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 「Windows」PCにサードパーティー製ウイルス対策ソフトはまだ必要か 印刷する メールで送る …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
「Windows」PCにサードパーティー製ウイルス対策ソフトはまだ必要か

印刷する メールで送る テキスト HTML 電子書籍 PDF ダウンロード テキスト 電子書籍 PDF クリップした記事をMyページから読むことができます Microsoftの誰かが4月、「Windows Learning Center」で文書を公開し、全く異論の余地のない主張を示した。「多くの『Windows 11』ユーザーにとって、『Microsoft Defender Anti...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
「Windows」PCにサードパーティー製ウイルス対策ソフトはまだ必要か

印刷する メールで送る テキスト HTML 電子書籍 PDF ダウンロード テキスト 電子書籍 PDF クリップした記事をMyページから読むことができます Microsoftの誰かが4月、「Windows Learning Center」で文書を公開し、全く異論の余地のない主張を示した。「多くの『Windows 11』ユーザーにとって、『Microsoft Defender Anti...

item.title: Six mysterious metal spheres that washed ashore last weekend…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Six mysterious metal spheres that washed ashore last weekend at Forrest Beach in northern Queensland, Australia, are “suspected space debris,” the Australian Space Agency announced Monday on social media. https://cnn.it/4bzjbLy
item.content:encoded: Six mysterious metal spheres that washed ashore last weekend at Forrest Beach in northern Queensland, Australia, are “suspected space debris,” the Australian Space Agency announced Monday on social media. https://cnn.it/4bzjbLy

item.title: A key federal commission gave initial approval for President…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A key federal commission gave initial approval for President Trump’s proposed 250-foot arch, signaling unprecedented leniency under a 116-year-old law that regulates the height of buildings in the capital.
item.content:encoded: A key federal commission gave initial approval for President Trump’s proposed 250-foot arch, signaling unprecedented leniency under a 116-year-old law that regulates the height of buildings in the capital.

item.title: Breaking News: The Trump administration moved to open the ha…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: The Trump administration moved to open the habitats of imperiled animals to farming, drilling, mining and other development. Environmentalists characterized it as the most severe erosion of protections for wildlife in half a century. www.nytimes.com/2026/07/10/c...
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: The Trump administration moved to open the habitats of imperiled animals to farming, drilling, mining and other development. Environmentalists characterized it as the most severe erosion of protections for wildlife in half a century. www.nytimes.com/2026/07/10/c...

item.title: 【今日のこよみ】 2026年7月11日(土) 旧暦5月27日 先勝 丙戌（ひのえ いぬ） 十二直 たいら 潮回り 中潮…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【今日のこよみ】
2026年7月11日(土)
旧暦5月27日　先勝
丙戌（ひのえ いぬ）
十二直 たいら

潮回り 中潮
正午月齢 26.0
正午月相 24.4
https://weathernews.jp/news/202607/100011/
item.content:encoded:
【今日のこよみ】
2026年7月11日(土)
旧暦5月27日　先勝
丙戌（ひのえ いぬ）
十二直 たいら

潮回り 中潮
正午月齢 26.0
正午月相 24.4

item.title: Unaccounted for campers in Reynolds County, Missouri, "have …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Unaccounted for campers in Reynolds County, Missouri, "have been located and rescued," Reynolds County Sheriff Caleb McCoy told CNN. Officials had earlier said a total of five people were unaccounted for there. https://cnn.it/4vZ3RjR
item.content:encoded: Unaccounted for campers in Reynolds County, Missouri, "have been located and rescued," Reynolds County Sheriff Caleb McCoy told CNN. Officials had earlier said a total of five people were unaccounted for there. https://cnn.it/4vZ3RjR

item.title: U.S. forces sharply ramped up their attacks against Iran thi…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: U.S. forces sharply ramped up their attacks against Iran this week, hitting more than 170 Iranian military targets on Tuesday and Wednesday, the Pentagon said. It was one of the most intense rounds of strikes since the war began more than four months ago.
item.content:encoded: U.S. forces sharply ramped up their attacks against Iran this week, hitting more than 170 Iranian military targets on Tuesday and Wednesday, the Pentagon said. It was one of the most intense rounds of strikes since the war began more than four months ago.

item.title: The knockout rounds delivered: England survived Mexico, Norw…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: The knockout rounds delivered: England survived Mexico, Norway stunned Brazil, Argentina escaped Egypt — and one red card may have changed the tone of the tournament. Watch Pitchside: reut.rs/4frzjBg
item.content:encoded: The knockout rounds delivered: England survived Mexico, Norway stunned Brazil, Argentina escaped Egypt — and one red card may have changed the tone of the tournament. Watch Pitchside: reut.rs/4frzjBg

item.title: While some were surprised to get the Trump passport, many tr…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: While some were surprised to get the Trump passport, many traveled from around the world for the unique design.
item.content:encoded: While some were surprised to get the Trump passport, many traveled from around the world for the unique design.
